**⭐「旧日梦呓」忘却篇-镭射票补货说明⭐**
各位守密人，第二批「旧日梦呓」忘却篇-镭射票将陆续上架淘宝“灵犀互娱官方旗舰店”：https://s.tb.cn/c.0wDlPO

**✦ 本次补货内容包含：**
混沌界域组合包、深海界域组合包、血肉界域组合包、超维界域组合包、随机组合包（有概率掉落主美KPK签名款、「环行·拉蒙娜」特殊款）、单张直售镭射票。
**✦ 发售方式：**订单付款后30天之内发出
**✦ 产品详情可点击查看：**
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1377892279213101157

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

**⭐The "Murmurs of Days Past" Faded Legacy - Laser Tickets Restock Announcement⭐**
Dear Keepers,
The second batch of The "Murmurs of Days Past" Faded Legacy - Laser Tickets will be gradually restocked in the store: https://s.tb.cn/c.0wDlPO

**✦ Restock Contents Include:**
Chaos Realm Combo、Deep Sea Realm Combo、Blood Caro Realm Combo、Ultra Realm Combo Pack、Random Combo Pack (There is a chance to obtain a signed version by KPK artists and the "Ramona: Timeworn" Special Edition)、Single direct sale
**✦ Release Method:**
Orders will be shipped within 30 days after payment is made.
**✦ Product Details:**
Click the link above to view more information：https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1377892279213101157
thread_title: 🚚周边补货说明┊Official Merchandise Restock Notice
